title: EoE Shinjis Psychological State
wikitext:
[]: EoE: Shinji's Psychological State             Quote Post by LelouchR2 » Tue Jun 28, 2011 1:49 am I am unsure whether there is a thread on this or not. If so, please link me I'd appreciate it. I did look. My question was on the matter of what Shinji might have been thinking or feeling before instrumentality began. When the Eva Series held Shinji up in the air, and Lilith emerged from Central Dogma, what do you guys think Shinji was feeling at the time? I know when he saw how Asuka was dead, he was real shook up. But Im unsure what Shinji was doing and when exactly did he lose control of Unit 01 to the point where he couldn't prevent Instrumentality.

[]: Re: EoE: Shinji's Psychological State             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 28, 2011 2:19 am Probably the closest thread would be this -- http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6238 LelouchR2 wrote: When the Eva Series held Shinji up in the air, and Lilith emerged from Central Dogma, what do you guys think Shinji was feeling at the time?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Jun 28, 2011 7:46 am His expression suggests terror

[]: Re: EoE: Shinji's Psychological State             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 28, 2011 10:29 am Ugh, I seriously wish all Gainax scripts were translated (and the corresponding screenshot-thumbnails uploaded), it would certainly make threads like this easier. I would help with that, if only the Gainax scripts were OCR-able. Mr. Tines wrote: His expression suggests terror, right up to the point where Giant Naked Kaworu makes an appearance and he blisses out.

[]: Re: EoE: Shinji's Psychological State             Quote Post by Viking » Tue Jun 28, 2011 1:07 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: [..] SFAiBL [..]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 28, 2011 1:12 pm S hinji's F aptastic A dventures i n B oobie L and Twas an NaveryW-ism, I believe. And I'm surprised it wasn't added to this page yet. Not even here http://wiki.evageeks.org/Geektionary#Acronym_Guide at the bottom. Huh. (....My current avatar makes typing this out so much worse.)

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Tue Jun 28, 2011 1:22 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: S hinji's F aptastic A dventures i n B oobie L and

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Tue Jun 28, 2011 1:33 pm ^THANKS a lot SSS. I think that his scream says enough.

[]: Re: EoE: Shinji's Psychological State             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Jun 28, 2011 5:49 pm LelouchR2 wrote: I am unsure whether there is a thread on this or not. If so, please link me I'd appreciate it. I did look. My question was on the matter of what Shinji might have been thinking or feeling before instrumentality began. When the Eva Series held Shinji up in the air, and Lilith emerged from Central Dogma, what do you guys think Shinji was feeling at the time? I know when he saw how Asuka was dead, he was real shook up. But Im unsure what Shinji was doing and when exactly did he lose control of Unit 01 to the point where he couldn't prevent Instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 28, 2011 9:07 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Twas an NaveryW-ism, I believe.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Tue Jun 28, 2011 9:51 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: S hinji's F aptastic A dventures i n B oobie L and

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Tue Jun 28, 2011 10:53 pm The expression of someone, if you will, who has hang-glided over hell.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 28, 2011 11:36 pm Fireand'chutes77 wrote: Interestingly enough, though, he seemed to pull it back together until GNR blinked

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Tue Jun 28, 2011 11:59 pm Reichu wrote: Not really. Before GNR joined the party, Shinji was enjoying his vicarious "stigmata", thinking about how dead Misato is (i.e., caught a glimpse of the bloody pendant), and clutching his head and muttering "chikushou" (which is like "dammit", I guess). He looks upon the ascending GNR with bug-eyed terror. Think you need to watch those scenes again.

[]:             Quote Post by kei_evageek_phl » Thu Jun 30, 2011 1:55 am during the start of EoE, Shinji is now confused, wanting Asuka's help(just notice first the scene where Shinji is alongside Asuka's Hospital Bed)....... And, during the time when he is alone, he wants to seek her mother's care, thus re-awakening EVA Unit 01 without the pilot..... That's my only opinion......

[]:             Quote Post by Rien » Sun Jul 10, 2011 10:28 pm I always saw the episode 25 and 26 as being what was going on through each of the characters' heads(still disappointed Ritsuko never got an analysis) while everything was happening during EoE since there was no reason for them to show the random shots of a dead Misato and Ritsuko in the same positions they were in during the movie. So bascially, what was seen in some episode 25 and all of 26 was the psychological mess in Shinji's head. EoE is Shinji becoming numb to everything around him including his will to live; he had reached his limit with seeing a dead Asuka and a world slowly being destroyed broke the final piece of sanity he had left.
